item.title: Just looking at HomeGoods, somehow buying more
item.description: POV: you go into HomeGoods “just looking” and leave with 4 candles, a blanket, and a lemon-shaped bowl. They really have everything.

media:content.media:title: Just looking at HomeGoods, somehow buying more
media:content.media:description: POV: you go into HomeGoods “just looking” and leave with 4 candles, a blanket, and a lemon-shaped bowl. They really have everything.
